title: Benedict Arnold: Hero Before Traitor
author: Roughdraft Stories
description: Before Benedict Arnold became the most famous traitor in American history, he was one of the Revolution's boldest and most effective officers. This factual narrative follows his courage, his anger, his betrayal, and the reasons his story remains so troubling.

chapters.title: Saratoga and the Wound That Became a Monument
West Point and the Price of Betrayal
